summary: The diff addresses all four requirements. Backend main.mo is updated with correct Artwork/MediaContacts types using ExternalBlob, frontend useQueries.ts uses ExternalBlob.fromBytes() for image uploads, AdminPanel.tsx fixes contacts sync, error messages, and image rendering. A migration module is added for stable storage compatibility. Coverage appears solid across REQ-1 through REQ-4, though some details are truncated.

missing_requirements.requirement: All update functions return a success or error variant that the frontend can distinguish.
missing_requirements.reason: The visible backend code in main.mo uses Runtime.trap() for errors rather than returning a Result/variant type. The truncated diff does not show updateMediaContacts, uploadLogo, uploadCoverImage, or uploadArtistPortrait returning an explicit success/error variant distinguishable by the frontend.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle data model transformation from old Artwork shape with raw Nat8 image bytes to new shape with optional ExternalBlob image.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not explicitly request a migration module or data migration logic. It only asked to fix update/upload failures without dropping existing fields. The migration module is not mentioned in any requirement.
